title: Turkish-Style Pide
description: A delicious Turkish flatbread topped with tasty cheese and a hint of turkish spices.
instructions: Roll out the pide dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Top the dough with mozzarella cheese, followed by crumbled feta cheese.
Sprinkle with Turkish red pepper flakes, if using.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley.
Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
